title: Hornet Removal in Floral Park, Queens | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Floral Park, Queens. Safe, effective nest elimination for $350-$550. Licensed experts serving residential areas near Belmont Park. Call today!
intro: Floral Park's tree-lined streets and well-maintained gardens create an ideal environment for hornets to build nests, posing risks to residents and families. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, professional hornet removal services throughout Floral Park, protecting homes near Centennial Gardens and throughout this charming Queens neighborhood. Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests while ensuring the safety of your property and loved ones.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Floral Park residents with licensed, insured technicians who understand the unique pest challenges of Queens' suburban neighborhoods. We offer same-day emergency service, transparent pricing between $350-$550, and a satisfaction guarantee that ensures hornets won't return.
localContext: Floral Park's proximity to Belmont Park and its abundance of mature trees and historic homes near the Nassau County border create numerous nesting opportunities for hornets in eaves, attics, and garden sheds. Our team is familiar with the architectural styles common to this area, from Tudor revivals to Cape Cods, and provides careful removal services that protect your property's character while eliminating dangerous stinging insects.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Floral Park?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal service throughout Floral Park. Once you contact us, we typically arrive within 2-4 hours for emergency situations. Our technicians come fully equipped to safely remove nests from trees, roof eaves, or any location on your property.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal price?
faqs.answer: Our pricing includes a thorough property inspection, complete nest removal, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and safe disposal of the nest. The final cost depends on nest size, location accessibility, and height requirements. We provide upfront quotes with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Floral Park's residential areas?
faqs.answer: Yes, Floral Park's tree-canopied streets and well-landscaped properties provide ideal nesting sites for hornets, especially during spring and summer months. Hornets often build nests in attics, under roof overhangs, in shrubs, and around garden areas. We serve homes throughout the neighborhood, from Jericho Turnpike down to the border areas.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our licensed technicians use professional-grade treatments that are highly effective against hornets while being safe for your family and pets when applied correctly. We take precautions to contain the treatment area, and we'll provide specific guidance on any temporary restrictions to ensure everyone's safety during and after the removal process.
